# Frontend

## Overview

The frontend provides a clean web interface that allows users to interact with DevPilot AI.

Users can:

* Enter project ideas
* Generate software project plans
* View AI-generated tasks
* Preview generated files
* Download project outputs

---

## Technology Stack

* React
* TypeScript
* Vite
* Tailwind CSS
* Antigravity

---

## Folder Structure

```text
frontend/

src/

components/

pages/

services/

hooks/

App.tsx
```

---

## Run

Install packages

```bash
npm install
```

Start development server

```bash
npm run dev
```

---

## Future Features

* Authentication
* Dark Mode
* Real-time Agent Logs
* Kanban Board
* Project History
* Team Collaboration
